nodes.label: Edward Condon

nodes.label: Oppenheimer UFO-Secrecy Overlay Hypothesis
nodes.summary: Hypothesis (via Grusch, Kissinger-Wang, Condon): J. Robert Oppenheimer, Kissinger, and Manhattan-Project-era atomic-secrecy architects established the classification framework subsequently overlaid onto UFO retrieval and reverse-engineering programs — resuscitation of a lost material-analysis approach.

sources.timestamp_end: Core theory connecting Manhattan Project secrecy framework to UFO classification

nodes.label: Multiple independent threads (Grusch's claim; Kissinger-Wang widow testimony; Condon's Manhattan Pro
nodes.summary: Multiple independent threads (Grusch's claim; Kissinger-Wang widow testimony; Condon's Manhattan Project placement) converge on a hypothesis that Oppenheimer and other Manhattan-Project architects were involved in early UFO programs and established the secrecy framework.

sources.quote: You've all heard of people like Robert J. Oppenheimer, even Henry Kissinger who were involved with UFO — these people actually had something to do with UFO.

type_specific.statement_text: Multiple independent threads (Grusch's claim; Kissinger-Wang widow testimony; Condon's Manhattan Project placement) converge on a hypothesis that Oppenheimer and other Manhattan-Project architects were involved in early UFO programs and established the secrecy framework.

nodes.label: The UAP Disclosure Act framework includes a provision for the US government to 'declare eminent doma
nodes.summary: The UAP Disclosure Act framework includes a provision for the US government to 'declare eminent domain' or ownership over any private-sector possession of NHI material — if enacted would be a huge breakthrough for material analysis.

sources.quote: To declare eminent domain or ownership over any possession — I think if that were passed it would be a huge breakthrough. Senator Rounds would create a board just like through the declassification.

type_specific.statement_text: The UAP Disclosure Act framework includes a provision for the US government to 'declare eminent domain' or ownership over any private-sector possession of NHI material — if enacted would be a huge breakthrough for material analysis.

nodes.label: Mike Johnson (House Speaker, Dayton Ohio district near Wright-Patterson) is identified as the person
nodes.summary: Mike Johnson (House Speaker, Dayton Ohio district near Wright-Patterson) is identified as the person who 'had a huge part in diluting the wording' around UAP Disclosure Act — top campaign donors are major aerospace companies.

sources.quote: Had a huge part in diluting the wording — Dayton Ohio, which is where Wright Patterson Air Force Base is. Donate to the campaigns of the Congress people. Kill this bipartisan provision.

type_specific.statement_text: Mike Johnson (House Speaker, Dayton Ohio district near Wright-Patterson) is identified as the person who 'had a huge part in diluting the wording' around UAP Disclosure Act — top campaign donors are major aerospace companies.
